data.content: Need to add the MSTest using directive:
data.reasoningText: MSTest 3.8.2 needs `using Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting;` — the implicit usings don't cover MSTest attributes. Let me add the using directive to the test file.
